* The painter required 192 color applications to finish the fresco. Each tile needed 4 colors, and with 48 tiles, the total number of color applications was 48 multiplied by 4, resulting in 192.  
* Each color bottle could cover 10 tiles, so the painter needed 19.2 bottles of each color. Since you can't use a fraction of a bottle, the painter had to purchase 20 bottles of each color to ensure there was enough paint for the entire project.
